## Location

Which module, function, or documentation page contains the error?

## Description of Error

Describe the mathematical error precisely.

## Correct Statement

Provide the correct mathematical statement with proof or reference.

## References

Cite relevant papers, textbooks, or other sources.

## Impact

How does this error affect the correctness of computations?
